run_summary.summary: 8 emails scanned across 6 threads. One new inbound: Wise Block (via Iris at Make Wonder INC — same rep as Bedsure) is asking for a rate quote for a paid YouTube/IG video. Urgent — their launch window is before Apr 25-30, so today or tomorrow is the window to respond. Yousky officially confirmed $250 as their hard ceiling; our counter is $2000+ — that gap isn't closing and the team needs to make a call. Flexsteel/Steinhafels campaign is now enrolled on Popfly and showing 'in progress' on Liz's dashboard as of Apr 22 — Kenny confirmed with Ian that you're good to go and ready to create content. Also updated last contact on Dreo, Govee, and Bedsure after Liz sent follow-ups on all three yesterday.

suggestions.message: Iris from Make Wonder INC (who also reps Bedsure) reached out TODAY for Wise Block's Eastern Botanicals Building Set — paid cash + free product, 1x YouTube/IG Video. They want your quote ASAP, launch before Apr 25-30. Heads up: sample delivery is 3-5 days after confirmation, so realistically content would be early May regardless, but they still want to hear from you now.

Luna confirmed again that $250 is Yousky's hard cap for a first collab (plus 10% commission). You've countered at $2000 twice. This isn't moving — worth a gut check on whether to accept $250 + commission or formally close this one out.

Flexsteel/Steinhafels campaign is live on Popfly — Kenny confirmed enrollment Apr 22. If this card isn't already in Content stage, worth moving it. Check your Popfly dashboard for any content deadlines.

deals.next_action: Respond to Iris with rate quote for 1 YouTube/IG Video
deals.notes: [Apr 23]: Inbound from Iris (Make Wonder INC — same rep as Bedsure). 1x YouTube/IG Video for Wise Block Botanical Series (Eastern flora-inspired building sets — Sakura Zen, Pine Breath, Maple Whisper, Blossom Harmony). Cash compensation + free set. They want our rate. Desired launch before Apr 25–30, but sample delivery is 3–5 days after confirmation so content would realistically be early May.
